mapper.select: select max(apply_bill_no) from wh_warehouse_apply where apply_bill_no like concat('%', #{date}, '%') and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (del_flag = 0 or del_flag is null)
mapper.insert: insert into wh_warehouse_apply ( id, tenant_id, apply_bill_no, bas_apply_id, bas_apply_bill_no, warehouse_id, department_id, bill_status, void_whole_flag, total_qty, total_amt, source_audit_date, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{id}, #{tenantId}, #{applyBillNo}, #{basApplyId}, #{basApplyBillNo}, #{warehouseId}, #{departmentId}, #{billStatus}, #{voidWholeFlag}0, #{totalQty}, #{totalAmt}, #{sourceAuditDate}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark} )

insert into wh_warehouse_apply_entry ( id, paren_id, tenant_id, bas_apply_id, bas_apply_bill_no, bas_apply_entry_id, line_no, material_id, warehouse_id, stk_inventory_id, unit_price, qty, price, amt, batch_no, batch_number, begin_time, end_time, supplier_id, factory_id, line_void_status, line_void_qty, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{id}, #{parenId}, #{tenantId}, #{basApplyId}, #{basApplyBillNo}, #{basApplyEntryId}, #{lineNo}, #{materialId}, #{warehouseId}, #{stkInventoryId}, #{unitPrice}, #{qty}, #{price}, #{amt}, #{batchNo}, #{batchNumber}, #{beginTime}, #{endTime}, #{supplierId}, #{factoryId}, #{lineVoidStatus}0, #{lineVoidQty}0, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark} )
mapper.select: select m.id, m.tenant_id, m.apply_bill_no, m.bas_apply_id, m.bas_apply_bill_no, m.warehouse_id, m.department_id, m.bill_status, m.void_whole_flag, m.void_whole_by, m.void_whole_time, m.void_whole_reason, m.total_qty, m.total_amt, m.source_audit_date, m.del_flag, m.create_by, m.create_time, m.update_by, m.update_time, m.remark, w.id w_id, w.name w_name, w.code w_code, d.id d_id, d.name d_name, d.code d_code from wh_warehouse_apply m left join fd_warehouse w on m.warehouse_id = w.id left join fd_department d on m.department_id = d.id where m.id = #{id} and (m.del_flag = 0 or m.del_flag is null)

select e.id e_id, e.paren_id e_paren_id, e.tenant_id e_tenant_id, e.bas_apply_id e_bas_apply_id, e.bas_apply_bill_no e_bas_apply_bill_no, e.bas_apply_entry_id e_bas_apply_entry_id, e.line_no e_line_no, e.material_id e_material_id, e.warehouse_id e_warehouse_id, e.stk_inventory_id e_stk_inventory_id, e.unit_price e_unit_price, e.qty e_qty, e.price e_price, e.amt e_amt, e.batch_no e_batch_no, e.batch_number e_batch_number, e.begin_time e_begin_time, e.end_time e_end_time, e.supplier_id e_supplier_id, e.factory_id e_factory_id, e.line_void_status e_line_void_status, e.line_void_qty e_line_void_qty, e.line_void_by e_line_void_by, e.line_void_time e_line_void_time, e.line_void_reason e_line_void_reason, e.del_flag e_del_flag, e.remark e_remark, coalesce(s.linked_qty, 0) e_linked_ck_qty, coalesce(s.pending_audit_qty, 0) e_ck_pending_audit_qty, coalesce(s.audited_qty, 0) e_ck_audited_qty, (e.qty - coalesce(e.line_void_qty, 0) - coalesce(s.linked_qty, 0)) e_pending_outbound_qty from wh_warehouse_apply_entry e left join ( select r.wh_apply_entry_id wid, sum(case when r.del_flag = 0 and r.link_status = 1 and (b.id is null or (b.del_flag = 0 or b.del_flag is null)) then r.ref_qty else 0 end) linked_qty, sum(case when r.del_flag = 0 and r.link_status = 1 and b.id is not null and (b.del_flag = 0 or b.del_flag is null) and b.bill_status = 1 and b.bill_type = 201 then r.ref_qty else 0 end) pending_audit_qty, sum(case when r.del_flag = 0 and r.link_status = 1 and b.id is not null and (b.del_flag = 0 or b.del_flag is null) and b.bill_status = 2 and b.bill_type = 201 then r.ref_qty else 0 end) audited_qty from wh_wh_apply_ck_entry_ref r left join stk_io_bill b on b.id = cast(r.ck_bill_id as unsigned) and b.tenant_id = r.tenant_id where r.wh_apply_id = #{parenId} and r.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} group by r.wh_apply_entry_id ) s on s.wid = e.id where e.paren_id = #{parenId} and (e.del_flag = 0 or e.del_flag is null) order by e.line_no asc, e.id asc

select e.id e_id, e.paren_id e_paren_id, e.tenant_id e_tenant_id, e.bas_apply_id e_bas_apply_id, e.bas_apply_bill_no e_bas_apply_bill_no, e.bas_apply_entry_id e_bas_apply_entry_id, e.line_no e_line_no, e.material_id e_material_id, e.warehouse_id e_warehouse_id, e.stk_inventory_id e_stk_inventory_id, e.unit_price e_unit_price, e.qty e_qty, e.price e_price, e.amt e_amt, e.batch_no e_batch_no, e.batch_number e_batch_number, e.begin_time e_begin_time, e.end_time e_end_time, e.supplier_id e_supplier_id, e.factory_id e_factory_id, e.line_void_status e_line_void_status, e.line_void_qty e_line_void_qty, e.line_void_by e_line_void_by, e.line_void_time e_line_void_time, e.line_void_reason e_line_void_reason, e.del_flag e_del_flag, e.remark e_remark, 0 e_linked_ck_qty, 0 e_ck_pending_audit_qty, 0 e_ck_audited_qty, 0 e_pending_outbound_qty from wh_warehouse_apply_entry e where e.id = #{id} and e.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (e.del_flag = 0 or e.del_flag is null)
mapper.update: update wh_warehouse_apply set void_whole_flag = 1, bill_status = 5, void_whole_by = #{voidWholeBy}, void_whole_time = #{voidWholeTime}, void_whole_reason = #{voidWholeReason}, update_by = #{voidWholeBy}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (void_whole_flag = 0 or void_whole_flag is null) and (del_flag = 0 or del_flag is null)

update wh_warehouse_apply_entry set line_void_status = #{lineVoidStatus}, line_void_qty = #{lineVoidQty}, line_void_by = #{lineVoidBy}, line_void_time = #{lineVoidTime}, line_void_reason = #{lineVoidReason}, update_by = #{lineVoidBy}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and paren_id = #{parenId} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (del_flag = 0 or del_flag is null)
mapper.select:
select coalesce(sum(ref_qty), 0) from wh_wh_apply_ck_entry_ref where wh_apply_entry_id = #{entryId} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and del_flag = 0 and link_status = 1
and (ck_bill_id is null or ck_bill_id != #{excludeCkBillId})

select m.id, m.tenant_id, m.apply_bill_no, m.bas_apply_id, m.bas_apply_bill_no, m.warehouse_id, m.department_id, m.bill_status, m.void_whole_flag, m.void_whole_by, m.void_whole_time, m.void_whole_reason, m.total_qty, m.total_amt, m.source_audit_date, m.del_flag, m.create_by, m.create_time, m.update_by, m.update_time, m.remark, w.id w_id, w.name w_name, w.code w_code, d.id d_id, d.name d_name, d.code d_code, ( select coalesce(sum(greatest(0, e.qty - coalesce(e.line_void_qty, 0) - coalesce(lk.linked_qty, 0) )), 0) from wh_warehouse_apply_entry e left join ( select r.wh_apply_entry_id wid, sum(case when r.del_flag = 0 and r.link_status = 1 and (b.id is null or (b.del_flag = 0 or b.del_flag is null)) then r.ref_qty else 0 end) linked_qty from wh_wh_apply_ck_entry_ref r left join stk_io_bill b on b.id = cast(r.ck_bill_id as unsigned) and b.tenant_id = r.tenant_id where r.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} group by r.wh_apply_entry_id ) lk on lk.wid = e.id where e.paren_id = m.id and e.tenant_id = m.tenant_id and (e.del_flag = 0 or e.del_flag is null) ) pending_outbound_total from wh_warehouse_apply m left join fd_warehouse w on m.warehouse_id = w.id left join fd_department d on m.department_id = d.id
m.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (m.del_flag = 0 or m.del_flag is null) and (m.void_whole_flag = 0 or m.void_whole_flag is null) and m.bill_status = 2 and m.apply_bill_no like concat('%', #{applyBillNo}, '%') and m.bas_apply_bill_no like concat('%', #{basApplyBillNo}, '%') and m.bas_apply_id = #{basApplyId} and m.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} and m.department_id = #{departmentId} and exists ( select 1 from wh_warehouse_apply_entry e2 left join ( select r.wh_apply_entry_id wid, sum(case when r.del_flag = 0 and r.link_status = 1 and (b.id is null or (b.del_flag = 0 or b.del_flag is null)) then r.ref_qty else 0 end) linked_qty from wh_wh_apply_ck_entry_ref r left join stk_io_bill b on b.id = cast(r.ck_bill_id as unsigned) and b.tenant_id = r.tenant_id where r.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} group by r.wh_apply_entry_id ) lk2 on lk2.wid = e2.id where e2.paren_id = m.id and e2.tenant_id = m.tenant_id and (e2.del_flag = 0 or e2.del_flag is null) and (e2.qty - coalesce(e2.line_void_qty, 0) - coalesce(lk2.linked_qty, 0)) > 0 )
order by m.create_time desc, m.id desc
